It was a beautiful sight
The raptors ignite, 
The old castle light.

The words out
He’s coming home, 
A week tonight 

Finally,
Their words found unity tonight.

data.body:
Agree with your larger point (capital’s ability to recoup). 

My quibble is that the insulation is mechanical. Inflation = higher prices, and assets are valued on a DCF of future earnings tied to those prices.

This is also before capital’s significant offensive advantage via the Cantillion effect
